message:
feat(web): add health check endpoints for Kubernetes-style probes (asupersync-gqayq)

HealthCheck system with liveness, readiness, and startup probe handlers.
HealthStatus enum (Healthy/Degraded/Unhealthy), HealthResponse with JSON
serialization and IntoResponse, configurable readiness gate for graceful
shutdown integration. 27 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
